relations: Comedy is a primary source of laughter, contributing to various health benefits
Stand-up comedy is a direct form of comedy, engaging audiences through live performances
Sitcoms are a television-based form of comedy, providing entertainment through humorous scenarios
Movies include comedy as a genre, aiming to entertain and bring joy to viewers
Comedy serves both as a source of entertainment and a vehicle for social commentary, highlighting its dual role in society
edges: Comedy is a primary source of laughter, contributing to various health benefits

Comedy serves both as a source of entertainment and a vehicle for social commentary, highlighting its dual role in society
